name: FinEx MSCI China UCITS ETF USD Share Class
summary: The investment objective of the fund is to deliver the total net return of the reference index (the MSCI Daily TR Net China USD index), minus the fees and costs of the fund. The reference index is denominated in USD.

name: FinEx MSCI Germany UCITS ETF (EUR)
summary: The investment objective of the fund is to deliver the total net return of the reference index (the MSCI Daily TR Net Germany Local index), minus the fees and costs of the fund. The reference index is denominated in EUR.

name: Finex Funds Icav - Finex Developed Markets Ex-Usa Ucits ETF
summary: The Finex Developed Markets Ex-Usa Ucits ETF provides exposure to stocks from developed countries, excluding the USA. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of companies in developed markets outside of the United States. The ETF is managed by Finex Funds Icav.

name: Finex Funds Icav - Finex Fallen Angels Ucits ETF
summary: The Finex Fallen Angels Ucits ETF invests in bonds that were initially investment-grade but have been downgraded to high-yield status. The fund seeks to generate returns from these "fallen angel" bonds, which may offer attractive yields. The ETF is managed by Finex Funds Icav.

name: FinEx Physically Backed Funds Public Limited Company - FinEx Gold ETF
summary: The FinEx Gold ETF provides investors with exposure to physical gold bullion. The ETF holds physical gold bars and aims to track the spot price of gold. FinEx Physically Backed Funds Public Limited Company manages the ETF.

name: FinEx Funds Public Limited Company - FinEx USA Information Technology UCITS ETF
summary: The FinEx USA Information Technology UCITS ETF provides exposure to companies in the information technology sector in the United States. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of IT companies, including software, hardware, and semiconductor firms. FinEx Funds Public Limited Company manages the ETF.

name: Finex Physically Backed Funds Plc - Finex Ffin Kazakhstan Equity Fund
